title: Better Dried Ghast
description: Enhances the Dried Ghast block for significantly improved visuals.
body:
# Better Dried Ghast

**Better Dried Ghast** is a simple resource pack that improves the look of the default Dried Ghast Block, which normally doesn’t look quite right in every view. This pack updates how it appears in *first-person*, *third-person*, and when *worn on the head*, making it cleaner, more consistent, and immersive across all perspectives.

## Features
- Enhanced displayed block model for better visuals  
- Works seamlessly in all perspectives  
- Improves cosmetic use

## Preview
![First person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb28796c89fc14d6c1d559b42eb8c776aec4305.png)
*More screenshots are available in the *Gallery* tab*

## Note  
This pack only changes the **block model**. It does _not_ alter any of its textures.
